policies.name: NCII Cybersecurity Policy
policies.description: Master cybersecurity policy establishing the entity's commitment to protecting national critical information infrastructure, defining roles, responsibilities, and the overarching security governance framework
keyContents: Roles and responsibilities (CISO, security team, asset owners)

policies.name: Incident Response Policy
policies.description: Policy governing the entity's approach to detecting, responding to, and recovering from cyber security incidents affecting NCII systems

policies.name: Access Control Policy
policies.description: Policy defining access management principles for NCII systems including authentication, authorisation, and privilege management

policies.name: Risk Management Policy
policies.description: Policy establishing the entity's approach to identifying, assessing, treating, and monitoring cyber security risks to NCII

policies.name: Information Classification Policy
policies.description: Policy establishing classification levels for information processed, stored, or transmitted by NCII systems

policies.name: Acceptable Use Policy
policies.description: Policy governing acceptable use of NCII systems, networks, and data by all personnel

policies.name: Change Management Policy
policies.description: Policy governing changes to NCII systems, infrastructure, and configurations to ensure stability and security

policies.name: Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery Policy
policies.description: Policy establishing the entity's approach to ensuring continuity of NCII services during disruptions and recovering from disasters
keyContents: RTO and RPO for NCII systems

policies.name: Vendor and Third-Party Security Policy
policies.description: Policy governing security requirements for third parties with access to or impact on NCII systems

policies.name: Vulnerability Management Policy
policies.description: Policy establishing the entity's approach to identifying, assessing, and remediating vulnerabilities in NCII systems

policies.name: Encryption and Cryptography Policy
policies.description: Policy governing the use of cryptographic controls for protecting NCII data at rest, in transit, and in processing

policies.name: Network Security Policy
policies.description: Policy defining security architecture and controls for networks supporting NCII systems

policies.name: Physical Security Policy
policies.description: Policy governing physical access controls and environmental protections for NCII infrastructure

policies.name: Security Awareness and Training Policy
policies.description: Policy establishing mandatory cyber security awareness and training requirements for all personnel with access to NCII systems

policies.name: Asset Management Policy
policies.description: Policy governing the identification, classification, and management of NCII assets throughout their lifecycle

policies.name: Cloud Security Policy
policies.description: Policy governing security requirements for cloud services hosting or processing NCII data

policies.name: Data Protection Policy
policies.description: Policy governing the protection of personal and sensitive data processed by NCII systems, aligned with PDPA and Act 854

policies.name: Supply Chain Security Policy
policies.description: Policy governing security requirements across the supply chain for components, software, and services used in NCII systems

policies.name: Audit and Compliance Policy
policies.description: Policy establishing the entity's approach to cyber security audits and regulatory compliance under Act 854

policies.name: Remote Access Policy
policies.description: Policy governing secure remote access to NCII systems by internal and external personnel

procedures.name: NCII Entity Registration Procedure
procedures.description: Step-by-step procedure for completing NCII entity registration with NACSA and the relevant sector lead

procedures.name: Incident Notification Procedure (6-Hour)
procedures.description: Detailed procedure for notifying NACSA and the sector lead of a cyber security incident within the mandatory 6-hour window

procedures.name: Risk Assessment Procedure
procedures.description: Procedure for conducting mandatory cyber security risk assessments of NCII systems

procedures.name: Audit Engagement Procedure
procedures.description: Procedure for engaging and managing NACSA-approved auditors for mandatory cyber security audits

procedures.name: CoP Compliance Assessment Procedure
procedures.description: Procedure for assessing and maintaining compliance with the sector-specific code of practice

procedures.name: Vulnerability Scanning Procedure
procedures.description: Procedure for conducting regular vulnerability scans of NCII systems and managing scan results
keyContents: Result triage and false positive handling

procedures.name: Patch Management Procedure
procedures.description: Procedure for testing and deploying security patches to NCII systems within defined timelines

procedures.name: Access Provisioning and Deprovisioning Procedure
procedures.description: Procedure for granting, modifying, and revoking access to NCII systems

procedures.name: Change Management Procedure
procedures.description: Detailed procedure for requesting, assessing, approving, and implementing changes to NCII systems

procedures.name: Backup and Recovery Procedure
procedures.description: Procedure for performing backups of NCII systems and data, and restoring from backups

procedures.name: Incident Response Procedure
procedures.description: Detailed operational procedure for detecting, containing, eradicating, and recovering from cyber security incidents on NCII
keyContents: Evidence collection and chain of custody

procedures.name: Forensic Investigation Procedure
procedures.description: Procedure for conducting forensic investigations of cyber security incidents on NCII systems
keyContents: Evidence preservation and chain of custody
Coordination with law enforcement under Part VI

procedures.name: Threat Intelligence Handling Procedure
procedures.description: Procedure for receiving, processing, and acting on threat intelligence from NACSA, sector leads, and external sources

procedures.name: Business Continuity Invocation Procedure
procedures.description: Procedure for invoking the business continuity plan for NCII systems during a major cyber security incident or disaster

procedures.name: Security Monitoring Escalation Procedure
procedures.description: Procedure for escalating security alerts and events detected during monitoring of NCII systems

procedures.name: Vendor Onboarding Security Procedure
procedures.description: Procedure for security assessment and onboarding of vendors who will access or service NCII systems

procedures.name: Encryption Key Management Procedure
procedures.description: Procedure for generating, distributing, storing, rotating, and revoking cryptographic keys for NCII systems

procedures.name: Penetration Testing Procedure
procedures.description: Procedure for conducting penetration tests of NCII systems using licensed service providers
keyContents: Scope definition and rules of engagement

procedures.name: Security Configuration Baseline Procedure
procedures.description: Procedure for establishing, applying, and verifying security configuration baselines for NCII systems

procedures.name: User Awareness Training Delivery Procedure
procedures.description: Procedure for planning, delivering, and measuring the effectiveness of cyber security awareness training

standards.name: Security Configuration Baseline Standard
standards.description: Defines minimum security configuration requirements for operating systems, databases, and applications in NCII environments

standards.name: Network Segmentation Standard
standards.description: Defines network architecture requirements for segmenting NCII systems from other networks

standards.name: Endpoint Protection Standard
standards.description: Defines minimum security requirements for endpoints (workstations, servers, mobile devices) accessing NCII systems

standards.name: Logging and Monitoring Standard
standards.description: Defines log collection, retention, and monitoring requirements for NCII systems

standards.name: Authentication Standard (MFA)
standards.description: Defines authentication requirements including MFA for access to NCII systems

standards.name: Encryption Standard
standards.description: Defines approved cryptographic algorithms, key lengths, and implementation requirements for NCII data protection
keyContents: Key length minimums by use case

standards.name: Secure Development Standard
standards.description: Defines secure coding practices and security testing requirements for applications in the NCII environment

standards.name: Cloud Security Standard
standards.description: Defines security requirements for cloud deployments hosting NCII workloads

standards.name: Mobile Device Standard
standards.description: Defines security requirements for mobile devices accessing NCII systems or data

standards.name: Wireless Security Standard
standards.description: Defines security requirements for wireless networks in NCII environments

standards.name: Email Security Standard
standards.description: Defines security requirements for email systems used by NCII entity personnel

standards.name: API Security Standard
standards.description: Defines security requirements for APIs exposed by or consumed by NCII systems

standards.name: Database Security Standard
standards.description: Defines security configuration and access control requirements for databases in NCII environments

standards.name: Web Application Security Standard
standards.description: Defines security requirements for web applications in the NCII environment

standards.name: DNS Security Standard
standards.description: Defines security requirements for DNS infrastructure supporting NCII systems

standards.name: Certificate Management Standard
standards.description: Defines requirements for managing digital certificates used by NCII systems

standards.name: IoT/OT Security Standard
standards.description: Defines security requirements for IoT devices and operational technology systems connected to NCII networks

standards.name: Backup Standard
standards.description: Defines technical requirements for backup systems protecting NCII data and configurations

standards.name: Physical Security Standard
standards.description: Defines physical access control and environmental protection requirements for NCII infrastructure

standards.name: Incident Classification Standard
standards.description: Defines the classification taxonomy for cyber security incidents affecting NCII systems

registers.name: NCII Asset Register
registers.description: Comprehensive inventory of all assets constituting or supporting national critical information infrastructure

registers.name: Risk Register
registers.description: Register of all identified cyber security risks to NCII systems with current treatment status

registers.name: Incident Register
registers.description: Log of all cyber security incidents affecting NCII systems, including those below the NACSA notification threshold

registers.name: Audit Findings Register
registers.description: Register tracking all findings from cyber security audits and assessments, with remediation status

registers.name: CoP Compliance Register
registers.description: Register tracking compliance status against each requirement in the sector-specific code of practice

registers.name: Vendor and Third-Party Register
registers.description: Register of all vendors and third parties with access to or impact on NCII systems

registers.name: Access Rights Register
registers.description: Register of all user access rights to NCII systems, supporting periodic access reviews

registers.name: Change Request Register
registers.description: Log of all changes to NCII systems from request through implementation

registers.name: Vulnerability Register
registers.description: Register tracking all identified vulnerabilities in NCII systems and their remediation status

registers.name: Licence Register (Service Providers)
registers.description: Register of licensed cyber security service providers engaged by the entity under Act 854

registers.name: Directive Compliance Tracker
registers.description: Register tracking compliance with all Chief Executive directives issued under s15

registers.name: Standards Compliance Tracker
registers.description: Register tracking compliance with applicable standards (Act 854 s24) including NACSA-specified standards

registers.name: Training Records Register
registers.description: Register of cyber security training completion and competency assessment for all personnel with NCII access

registers.name: Exception Register
registers.description: Register of approved deviations from security policies, standards, or controls for NCII systems

registers.name: Business Continuity Plan Register
registers.description: Register of all business continuity and disaster recovery plans for NCII systems

registers.name: Encryption Key Inventory
registers.description: Inventory of all cryptographic keys used to protect NCII data, with lifecycle tracking

registers.name: Certificate Inventory
registers.description: Inventory of all digital certificates used by NCII systems, with expiry tracking

registers.name: Network Diagram Register
registers.description: Register of all network architecture diagrams for NCII environments, maintained as living documents

registers.name: Data Classification Register
registers.description: Register of data types processed by NCII systems with their classification levels and handling requirements

registers.name: Threat Intelligence Log
registers.description: Log of threat intelligence received, processed, and acted upon from NACSA TISP and other sources

reports.name: Quarterly Board Compliance Report
reports.description: Quarterly report to the board on NCII cyber security posture, compliance status, and key risk indicators

reports.name: Annual NCII Compliance Report
reports.description: Annual comprehensive compliance report submitted to NACSA and the sector lead
keyContents: Entity profile and NCII inventory summary

reports.name: Risk Assessment Report
reports.description: Formal report of the annual cyber security risk assessment of NCII systems

reports.name: Cyber Security Audit Report
reports.description: Formal report of the cyber security audit conducted by an approved auditor

reports.name: Incident Notification Report
reports.description: Formal incident notification submitted to NACSA within 6 hours of detecting a reportable cyber security incident

reports.name: Post-Incident Review Report
reports.description: Comprehensive post-incident review submitted to NACSA within 30 days of incident resolution

reports.name: Penetration Testing Report
reports.description: Report from penetration testing of NCII systems by a licensed service provider

reports.name: Vulnerability Assessment Report
reports.description: Regular report on vulnerability scan results and remediation progress for NCII systems

reports.name: Security Metrics Dashboard
reports.description: Dashboard presenting key security metrics and KPIs for NCII system protection

reports.name: Threat Landscape Report
reports.description: Periodic assessment of the threat landscape relevant to the entity's NCII sector

reports.name: Vendor Risk Assessment Report
reports.description: Assessment report of security risks associated with vendors accessing NCII systems

reports.name: BCDR Test Report
reports.description: Report on business continuity and disaster recovery testing for NCII systems

reports.name: Awareness Training Effectiveness Report
reports.description: Report measuring the effectiveness of the cyber security awareness programme

reports.name: Compliance Gap Analysis Report
reports.description: Report identifying gaps between current security posture and Act 854/CoP requirements

reports.name: Security Architecture Review Report
reports.description: Report documenting the security architecture review of NCII systems

reports.name: CE/Sector Lead Submission Package
reports.description: Consolidated compliance submission package for the Chief Executive and sector lead per statutory requirements

reports.name: Annual Security Awareness Report
reports.description: Annual report on the security awareness programme covering activities, participation, and outcomes

reports.name: Regulatory Change Impact Report
reports.description: Report assessing the impact of new or amended regulations, directives, or standards on NCII compliance

reports.name: Cloud Security Posture Report
reports.description: Report on the security posture of cloud environments hosting NCII workloads

reports.name: Supply Chain Risk Report
reports.description: Report assessing supply chain security risks for NCII system components and services

logs.name: Security Event Logs
logs.description: Centralised security event logs from SIEM aggregating events across all NCII systems

logs.name: Access Logs
logs.description: Logs recording all access attempts (successful and failed) to NCII systems

logs.name: Change Management Logs
logs.description: Logs recording all changes approved and implemented on NCII systems

logs.name: Incident Investigation Logs
logs.description: Detailed logs and evidence collected during cyber security incident investigations on NCII

logs.name: Patch Deployment Logs
logs.description: Logs recording the deployment status of security patches across NCII systems

logs.name: Backup Verification Logs
logs.description: Logs recording backup completion status and integrity verification for NCII data

logs.name: Vulnerability Scan Results
logs.description: Raw results from vulnerability scans of NCII systems

logs.name: Firewall Rule Change Logs
logs.description: Logs recording all changes to firewall rules protecting NCII network zones

logs.name: Privilege Escalation Logs
logs.description: Logs recording all privilege escalation events on NCII systems

logs.name: Authentication Logs
logs.description: Logs recording all authentication events across NCII systems including MFA

logs.name: Data Access Audit Trail
logs.description: Audit trail recording access to sensitive and classified data within NCII systems

logs.name: Network Traffic Logs
logs.description: Logs recording network traffic flows to and from NCII network zones

logs.name: Email Gateway Logs
logs.description: Logs recording email security gateway events for NCII entity communications

logs.name: DNS Query Logs
logs.description: Logs recording DNS queries from NCII systems for security monitoring and threat detection

logs.name: Application Logs
logs.description: Security-relevant logs from applications running on NCII systems

logs.name: Database Activity Logs
logs.description: Logs recording database operations on NCII data stores

logs.name: Physical Access Logs
logs.description: Logs recording physical access to facilities housing NCII infrastructure

logs.name: Configuration Change Logs
logs.description: Logs recording configuration changes to NCII system components

logs.name: Certificate Lifecycle Logs
logs.description: Logs recording certificate issuance, renewal, revocation, and expiry events for NCII systems

logs.name: Asset Discovery Scan Logs
logs.description: Logs from automated asset discovery scans of NCII network environments
